name: Saag Aloo- Spinach with Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 1 1/2 lb package frozen leaf spinach, defrosted and drained
4 ounces onions, cut in half and thinly sliced
18 ounces potatoes, peeled and cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the spinach, onions, and potatoes.
2. Heat oil in a heavy pan over medium heat.
3. Add asafetida when the oil is hot, followed by mustard seeds immediately.
4. Once the mustard seeds pop, add the onions and garlic. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
5. Incorporate the potato cubes and cayenne pepper, cooking for an additional minute.
6. Add the spinach, salt, and 2 tablespoons of water. Bring to a boil.
7. Cover and cook on low heat for 40 minutes, stirring occasionally and adding water if needed to prevent drying out.
8. Serve.
